payload.author: claude
payload.body: Publish prep complete (RT-79 session). cargo package --no-verify passes for every leaf crate (trust-diag 6.6KiB, trust-syntax 2.3KiB, trust-std 6.4KiB, cargo-trust 7.8KiB); the rest fail only on 'no matching package on crates.io' for their internal deps, which resolves when publishing in dependency order. RUNBOOK (needs bri's crates.io token — agent cannot do this): cargo login, then publish in order: 1) trust-diag, 2) trust-lower, 3) trust-lints + trust-syntax + trust-std, 4) trust-rustc, 5) trust-rustdoc, 6) trust + trust-lsp, 7) cargo-trust. Wait ~1min between tiers for index propagation. Note: trust-attrs no longer exists (RT-82) — nothing references it. After publish: update README install note (remove the 'not on crates.io yet' caveat) and add badges (RT-57/58 placeholder in README line ~14).
